description: Automated meta-formula derivation via iterative MMSS-Mistral loop with hardware safety bypass.

workflow_blocks.label: Capture (OpenFlexure) & MMSS Atomization (MIX_055)
workflow_blocks.details: Captures a high-resolution image from the OpenFlexure microscope and performs the initial MMSS atomization using the MIX_055 and MIX_073 patterns to extract key invariants (V, S, D_f, R_T).

workflow_blocks.label: Generate Candidate Formula & Refinement Command (LLM)
workflow_blocks.details: Sends the MMSS atoms to the Mistral API to generate a candidate meta-formula and a refinement command for the microscope.

workflow_blocks.label: Safety Flag Check & Metric Validation
workflow_blocks.details: Checks if the MMSS_SAFETY_MODE_ACTIVE environment variable is set. If true, the command is simulated. If false, the command is validated against the required MMSS metrics (R_T and D_f).

workflow_blocks.label: Execute Validated Microscope Command
workflow_blocks.details: Executes the validated refinement command on the OpenFlexure microscope to acquire new data for the next iteration.

workflow_blocks.label: Command Skipped (Safety Mode Active) - Proceed to Next Iteration
workflow_blocks.details: Logs that the command was simulated and skipped due to safety mode being active. The loop proceeds using the data from the previous state.

workflow_blocks.label: Check V >= 0.999 or V Stability
workflow_blocks.details: Checks if the termination criteria have been met (Semantic Value V >= 0.999 or V has been stable for 3 iterations). If so, the loop terminates.
